subject: No one can hear me in Zoom
description: Microphone works in other apps; Zoom shows mic unmuted but participants hear silence.

ts_steps.title: macOS Microphone privacy
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone → Zoom on.

ts_steps.title: Sound Input level
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Sound → Input — meter moves.

ts_steps.title: Bluetooth headset
ts_steps.action: Forget and re-pair if HFP stuck.

ts_steps.title: QuickTime test
ts_steps.action: New audio recording — if silent, macOS path not Zoom.

internal_information: Wrong input, Bluetooth profile, TCC denial, Zoom audio cache.
